block_00: Sending you love and strength in the holy month of Ramadan!
block_05: IQ Option sends the warmest wishes to all Muslims around the globe in the holy month of Ramadan. The blessed month of giving has begun, and we are here too helping you to become a part of doing good.
block_06: By entering this tournament you will contribute to the delivery of clean drinking water in the most remote areas to help kids of Africa.
block_07: Half of the tournament revenue will be donated to one of the biggest charity foundations in Africa.
block_08: May your fasting be accepted and have a delicious iftar!
